capabilities.title: Capability Status

creatorMonthly.description: Best for partial course research and a first experience with a smaller group of learners.
creatorMonthly.title: Monthly · Lite

creatorMonthlyPro.description: Built for complete course research and a full experience for a small learner cohort.
creatorMonthlyPro.title: Monthly · Pro

creatorYearly.description: Complete course delivery and operations for programs serving roughly 300 to 500 learners.
creatorYearly.title: Yearly · Pro

creatorYearlyLite.description: Complete course delivery and operations for programs serving roughly 100 to 300 learners.
creatorYearlyLite.title: Yearly · Lite

creatorYearlyPremium.description: Complete course delivery and operations for larger programs serving roughly 8000 to 12000 learners.
creatorYearlyPremium.title: Yearly · Premium

creatorLarge.description: A larger refill for focused launch windows, heavy previews, or seasonal demand spikes.
creatorLarge.title: 120-credit pack

creatorMedium.description: A flexible refill for active course iteration and medium-volume creator workloads.
creatorMedium.title: 50-credit pack

creatorSmall.description: A lightweight refill for low-balance recovery, trial runs, or short bursts of creation.
creatorSmall.title: 20-credit pack

creatorXLarge.description: A high-capacity refill for major launches, bulk generation, or pre-peak traffic preparation.
creatorXLarge.title: 320-credit pack
